title: WetLab-2 RT-qPCR Procedure
author: Jimmy Jung
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.i86chze

steps.instruction: Preparation of qPCR reactions (per 25ul reaction): Promega GoTaq Probe Master Mix (2X): 12.5 ul Forward Primer (20X): 1 ul Reverse Primer (20X): 1 ul Hydrolysis Probe (20X): 1 ul DNA Template: varied from 1 pg to 1ug per reaction Molecular Biology Grade Water: to 25 ul total volume

Preparation of RT-qPCR reactions (per 25ul reaction): Promega GoTaq Probe Master Mix (2X): 12.5 ul GoScript RT Mix for 1-step RT-qPCR: 5 ul Forward Primer (20X): 1 ul Reverse Primer (20X): 1 ul Hydrolysis Probe (20X): 1 ul RNA Template: varied as listed (usually around 5ng) Molecular Biology Grade Water: to 25 ul total volume
